name: Sweet Potato Chips
recipeIngredient: 1 pound sweet potatoes, peeled, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the potato slices in 2 quarts of ice water for 1 hour. Drain and pat dry.
2. Heat oil to 375 degrees F (190°C) in an electric skillet or deep-fat fryer.
3. Fry the potato slices, 7-8 at a time, until golden brown. Turn once, cooking for 1-2 minutes.
4. Drain on paper towels.
5. Sprinkle with salt and let cool.
